title: CChili-Chili-Pork Paella-pan-Stir-fry
description: This yeasty, creamy Argentinian dish features harissa spice and is sugar-free-friendly. Cooked in a paella pan, it's a one-pot meal that’s perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Mix flour with a bit of water to make a slurry for thickening the sauce.
In the pan, add olive oil and heat it up. Sear the pork belly until golden brown on all sides.
Add chili peppers, tomato paste, salt, sugar-free soy sauce, chili flakes, and harissa paste to the pan. Stir well.
Pour in the flour slurry into the pan, stirring continuously for a minute to avoid lumps.
Simmer the mixture covered for about 15 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
Serve hot as a main dish.
